util)
crackfortranc
Z	d	S
TestAbstractInterfacez
.f90Z
add1Z
add2a
        module ops_module
          abstract interface
            subroutine op(x, y, z)
              integer, intent(in) :: x, y
              integer, intent(out) :: z
            end subroutine
          end interface
        contains
          subroutine foo(x, y, r1, r2)
            integer, intent(in) :: x, y
            integer, intent(out) :: r1, r2
            procedure (op) add1, add2
            procedure (op), pointer::p
            p=>add1
            call p(x, y, r1)
            p=>add2
            call p(x, y, r2)
          end subroutine
        end module
        subroutine add1(x, y, z)
          integer, intent(in) :: x, y
          integer, intent(out) :: z
          z = x + y
        end subroutine
        subroutine add2(x, y, z)
          integer, intent(in) :: x, y
          integer, intent(out) :: z
          z = x + 2 * y
        end subroutine
        c
moduleZ
ops_moduleZ
foo)
self
N/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/numpy/f2py/tests/test_abstract_interface.py
test_abstract_interface0
z-TestAbstractInterface.test_abstract_interfacec
)	Nz
gh18403_mod.f90
                module test
                  abstract interface
                    subroutine foo()
                    end subroutine
                  end interface
                end module test
                r
body
blockz
abstract interface)

write
